employers.description: Vodafone Egypt is one of the largest telecommunications companies in Egypt, providing mobile, internet, and enterprise services to millions of customers.
Fawry is Egypt's leading e-payment network and digital transformation enabler, providing financial inclusion through technology.
Instabug is a leading platform for mobile app testing, debugging, and performance monitoring, trusted by developers worldwide.
Paymob is a leading payment infrastructure company in MENA, empowering businesses to accept and send payments seamlessly.
Jumia is Africa's leading e-commerce platform, connecting buyers and sellers across Egypt and the continent.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Developer
jobs.description:
We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer to join our SDK team at Instabug. You will work on building and improving our JavaScript SDK and web dashboards that are used by thousands of mobile app developers worldwide.

You will collaborate closely with backend engineers, designers, and product managers to deliver high-quality user interfaces.
jobs.requirements:
- 4+ years of experience in frontend development
- Strong proficiency in Vue.js or React
- Experience with TypeScript
- Familiarity with testing (Jest, Cypress)
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines
jobs.benefits:
- Competitive salary in EGP
- Full remote option
- Health insurance
- Annual performance bonus
- Learning & development budget

jobs.title: Backend Laravel Developer
jobs.description:
Fawry is hiring a Backend Laravel Developer to work on our core payment processing systems. You will design and implement APIs consumed by millions of users daily.

This is a great opportunity to work on high-load, mission-critical systems in Egypt's fintech space.
jobs.requirements:
- 3+ years of experience with PHP & Laravel
- Strong understanding of REST API design
- Experience with MySQL and Redis
- Knowledge of payment systems is a plus
- Experience with Docker
jobs.benefits:
- Competitive package
- Medical insurance (for employee and family)
- Transportation allowance
- Profit sharing
- Flexible working hours

jobs.title: Senior Product Designer
jobs.description: Join Instabug as a Senior Product Designer and help shape the future of mobile development tools. You'll be responsible for end-to-end design of our dashboard and reporting features used by 25,000+ apps.
jobs.requirements:
- 4+ years of experience in product/UX design
- Expert-level Figma skills
- Strong portfolio demonstrating complex product design
- Experience with design systems
- Ability to conduct user research
jobs.benefits:
- Equity/stock options
- Remote-first culture
- World-class engineering team
- Conferences and learning budget
- Health insurance

jobs.title: Product Manager – Merchant Payments
jobs.description: Paymob is looking for a Product Manager to lead the Merchant Payments product line. You will work with engineering, design, and business teams to define the product roadmap and deliver features that enable merchants to accept digital payments.
jobs.requirements:
- 4+ years of product management experience
- Experience in fintech or payments preferred
- Strong data analysis skills
- Excellent communication and stakeholder management
- MBA is a plus
jobs.benefits:
- ESOP options
- Hybrid work model
- International exposure
- Premium health insurance
- Annual bonus

jobs.title: Performance Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Jumia Egypt is seeking a Performance Marketing Manager to own our paid acquisition channels. You will manage multi-million EGP budgets across Google, Meta, and TikTok to drive app installs and GMV growth.
jobs.requirements:
- 3+ years in performance marketing
- Proven experience managing large ad budgets
- Google Ads & Meta Ads certified
- Strong analytical skills and SQL knowledge
- E-commerce experience is a plus
jobs.benefits:
- Mobile allowance
- Transportation
- Social insurance
- Career growth in a pan-African company

jobs.title: Data Analyst – Business Intelligence
jobs.description: Vodafone Egypt is looking for a Data Analyst to join our Business Intelligence team. You will build dashboards, analyze customer behavior data, and provide insights to support strategic decisions.
jobs.requirements:
- 2+ years of experience in data analytics
- Proficiency in SQL
- Experience with Power BI or Tableau
- Strong Excel and Python skills
- Telecoms experience is a plus
jobs.benefits:
- Mobile line with free data
- Full medical insurance
- Pension plan
- Annual leave 21 days
- Corporate discounts

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Fawry is expanding its infrastructure team and is looking for a DevOps Engineer to manage cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring for our payment platform.
jobs.requirements:
- 3+ years of DevOps/SRE experience
- Strong AWS or GCP knowledge
- Experience with Kubernetes and Docker
- Infrastructure as Code (Terraform)
- On-call availability
jobs.benefits:
- Competitive salary
- Family medical insurance
- Life insurance
- Transport allowance
- Profit sharing program

jobs.title: Associate Product Manager
jobs.description: A great entry point for aspiring PMs. You will support the core product team at Paymob in running discovery sessions, writing specs, and tracking OKRs.
jobs.requirements:
- 1-2 years of product or business analysis experience
- Analytical mindset
- Strong written and verbal communication
- Familiarity with Agile/Scrum
- Fresh MBAs are welcome to apply
jobs.benefits:
- Mentorship program
- ESOP options
- Health insurance
- Hybrid model

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
jobs.description: Jumia is growing fast and we need a Talent Acquisition Specialist to help us hire top talent across tech and business functions. You will manage the full recruitment cycle from sourcing to offer.
jobs.requirements:
- 2+ years in recruitment, ideally tech roles
- Experience with ATS systems
- Strong interviewing and assessment skills
- Network in Egypt's tech community
- High-volume hiring experience
jobs.benefits:
- Transportation
- Social insurance
- Medical insurance
- International career path

jobs.title: SEO & Content Specialist
jobs.description: Vodafone Egypt's digital team is looking for an SEO & Content Specialist to grow organic traffic and create compelling digital content for our brand.
jobs.requirements:
- 2+ years of SEO experience
- Proven content writing skills in Arabic and English
- Experience with Google Search Console and SEMrush
- Basic HTML knowledge
- Knowledge of telecoms market is a plus
jobs.benefits:
- Mobile line with data
- Medical insurance
- Training and certifications
- Flexible working days

jobs.title: Mobile Developer (React Native)
jobs.description: Join Vodafone Egypt's mobile team and help build the next generation of the My Vodafone app, used by millions of customers.
jobs.requirements:
- 3+ years in mobile development
- Strong React Native experience
- Knowledge of iOS and Android deployment
- REST API integration
- Redux or MobX experience
jobs.benefits:
- Premium mobile plan
- Health insurance
- Bonus scheme
- On-site gym and canteen

jobs.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
jobs.description: Jumia Egypt is seeking a BI Analyst to help the business understand key metrics across supply chain, marketing, and seller performance.
jobs.requirements:
- 2+ years in BI or data analytics
- Advanced SQL
- Tableau or Looker experience
- Python for data wrangling
- E-commerce or marketplace experience preferred
jobs.benefits:
- Competitive salary
- Medical insurance
- Pan-African exposure
- Career development

applications.cover_letter: I am very excited to apply for the Senior Frontend Developer role at Instabug. With 5 years of Vue.js experience and a strong TypeScript background, I believe I can make an immediate impact on your SDK team.
Laravel is my primary stack and I have 4 years of experience building high-performance APIs. I am thrilled to apply for the Backend Developer role at Fawry.

With 6 years of product management experience in fintech and an MBA, I am a strong fit for the PM role at Paymob. I have followed Paymob's growth closely and would love to contribute to the merchant payments roadmap.
I have 2 years of performance marketing experience managing budgets on Google and Meta. Jumia's scale is exactly the challenge I am looking for.
While my background is primarily backend, I have strong JavaScript fundamentals and have been learning Vue.js seriously for the past year.
I have strong analytical skills alongside my frontend background, and I am excited about the BI Analyst role at Vodafone Egypt.
I have worked with Laravel APIs alongside Vue.js and am comfortable taking on a backend role when required.

company_reviews.title: Best place I've worked at in Egypt
company_reviews.pros: Fully remote, excellent engineering culture, amazing team, world-class product. You'll learn incredibly fast here.
company_reviews.cons: Salary is good but can be better compared to international companies. Growth to staff engineer level can be slow.

company_reviews.title: Great company with real technical challenges
company_reviews.pros: Working on a high-scale payment system is genuinely exciting. The tech stack is modern and the team is skilled.
company_reviews.cons: Pressure can be high during peak seasons. On-call support rotations are taxing.

company_reviews.title: Paymob is building something special
company_reviews.pros: Fast-paced environment with real ownership. Leadership is transparent and accessible. ESOP is a great perk.
company_reviews.cons: Processes are still maturing. Coordination between teams can be slow. Lots of context-switching.

company_reviews.title: Good brand, challenging work environment
company_reviews.pros: The scale of the platform is impressive and you get exposure to real product challenges. Good team spirit.
company_reviews.cons: Long hours are common, especially before sales events. Salary increments are below market average.
